title: Iron Furnaces framed
description: Changes upgraded furnaces to be framed instead.
body:
This is a resource pack for _Iron Furnaces_ mod by **XenoMustache**. It changes upgraded furnace textures to be framed, instead of being made whole from a material block.

Below, the comparison:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84889da30a148c45f42df6b29cbc483bff4aaff.png)
